currentFocus: Accepted coordination policy/state integration is being closed out, and the next baton is a main-based repo-quality, modularity, and stale-doc cleanup slice.

validation.nextSlice: Use docs/state gates for documentation-only cleanup and add the relevant WinUI/AppCore gates before claiming any code or UI behavior change.
